untranslatable_reason: CCI (Commodity Channel Index) is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Available momentum indicators are: RSI, MACD, Stochastic, and ADX. CCI would need to be added to the indicator library or the signal must be translated to use an allowed indicator.
translation_notes: Signal references CCI indicator which is not supported. The closest available momentum indicators for overbought detection are rsi_14 (>70), stoch_k (>80), or macd_hist crossing above macd_signal. User should clarify which alternative indicator to use or add CCI to the system.
